title: Fix CI to run full make check on all Python versions

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Did: updated ci.yml to run make check (includes rust + parity) on all Python matrix entries 3.9–3.12; removed conditional tarpaulin/install. Next: commit and push, watch CI. Blockers: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Closed: CI matrix now runs full make check (python+r clippy/tarpaulin/parity) on every job.
